Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/YatCC/test/task3/CMakeLists.txt:
     1	file(REAL_PATH ../rtlib _rtlib_dir)
     2	file(REAL_PATH ../task0 _task0_out BASE_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR})
     3	file(REAL_PATH ../task2 _task2_out BASE_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR})
     4	
     5	# 生成测例表
     6	if(NOT TASK3_CASES_TXT)
     7	  set(_task3_cases "")
     8	  foreach(_case ${TEST_CASES})
     9	    if(NOT _case MATCHES ${TASK3_EXCLUDE_REGEX})
    10	      list(APPEND _task3_cases ${_case})
    11	    endif()
    12	  endforeach()
    13	  set(TASK3_CASES_TXT ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/cases.txt)
    14	  string(REPLACE ";" "\n" _lines "${_task3_cases}")
    15	  file(WRITE ${TASK3_CASES_TXT} "${_lines}")
    16	else()
    17	  exec_program(
    18	    ${Python3_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/..
    19	    ARGS common.py ${TEST_CASES_DIR} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
    20	         ${TASK3_CASES_TXT}
    21	    OUTPUT_VARIABLE _task3_cases)
    22	endif()
    23	
    24	# 生成全部答案
    25	add_custom_target(
    26	  task3-answer
    27	  ${Python3_EXECUTABLE}
    28	  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/answer.py
    29	  ${TEST_CASES_DIR}
    30	  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
    31	  ${TEST_CASES_TXT}
    32	  ${CLANG_EXECUTABLE}
    33	  ${_rtlib_dir}
    34	  ${TEST_RTLIB_SO}
    35	  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
    36	  USES_TERMINAL
    37	  SOURCES answer.py)
    38	
    39	add_dependencies(task3-answer task0-answer test-rtlib)
    40	
    41	# 对实验进行评分
    42	add_custom_target(
    43	  task3-score
    44	  COMMAND
    45	    ${Python3_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/score.py ${TEST_CASES_DIR}
    46	    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR} ${TASK3_CASES_TXT} ${CTEST_COMMAND}
    47	    ${CLANG_PLUS_EXECUTABLE} ${TEST_RTLIB_SO}
    48	  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
    49	  USES_TERMINAL
    50	  SOURCES score.py)
    51	
    52	add_dependencies(task3-score task3 task3-answer test-rtlib)
    53	
    54	# 为每个测例创建一个测试
    55	if(TASK3_REVIVE)
    56	  # 如果启用复活，则将前一个实验的标准答案作为输入
    57	  add_dependencies(task3-score task2-answer)
    58	
    59	  foreach(_case ${_task3_cases})
    60	    set(_output_dir ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/${_case})
    61	    file(MAKE_DIRECTORY ${_output_dir})
    62	    add_test(NAME task3/${_case}
    63	             COMMAND task3 ${_task2_out}/${_case}/answer.json
    64	                     ${_output_dir}/output.ll)
    65	    add_test(
    66	      NAME test3/${_case}
    67	      COMMAND
    68	        ${Python3_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/score.py
    69	        ${TEST_CASES_DIR} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR} ${TASK3_CASES_TXT}
    70	        ${CTEST_COMMAND} ${CLANG_PLUS_EXECUTABLE} ${TEST_RTLIB_SO} --single
    71	        ${_case})
    72	  endforeach()
    73	
    74	  message(AUTHOR_WARNING "在实验三复活：请在构建 task2-answer 后再使用 task3 的测试项目。")
    75	
    76	else()
    77	  # 否则以实验零的标准答案作为输入
    78	  add_dependencies(task3-score task0-answer)
    79	
    80	  foreach(_case ${_task3_cases})
    81	    set(_output_dir ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/${_case})
    82	    file(MAKE_DIRECTORY ${_output_dir})
    83	    add_test(NAME task3/${_case} COMMAND task3 ${_task0_out}/${_case}
    84	                                         ${_output_dir}/output.ll)
    85	    add_test(
    86	      NAME test3/${_case}
    87	      COMMAND
    88	        ${Python3_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/score.py
    89	        ${TEST_CASES_DIR} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR} ${TASK3_CASES_TXT}
    90	        ${CTEST_COMMAND} ${CLANG_PLUS_EXECUTABLE} ${TEST_RTLIB_SO} --single
    91	        ${_case})
    92	  endforeach()
